tool_call_details.input_preview: --- title: 'Lifting Auto-Research' description: 'Auto-research is a loop. Letting an agent optimize that loop lifts it one level up. Doing this recursively builds a tower. Whether the tower ascends or just spins depends on a single property: grounding.' date: 2026-04-27 tags: ['agents', 'math', 'systems'] authors:
